# Briefing — sample run

A small synthetic run used to characterize `vault.project_run()`. The
shape mirrors a real Nightly run (tasks/, lessons.md, briefing.md) but
the content is deliberately minimal.

## What landed

- **Task 0001 — sample-task-one** (status: done).
- **Task 0002 — sample-task-two** (status: parked).
